flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Itawamba Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Itawamba Community College rose 22% between 2006 and 2009 (18.3% → 22.3%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Itawamba Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (65.2% → 73.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Itawamba Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8k → 4.2k).
